description: RxNES is a Nintendo Entertainment System emulator that attempts to upgrade the graphics of the NES to modern levels.

autoupdate.command: wget https://www.rxnes.com/download/rxnes.zip -O $dir/rxnes-new.zip && if $(CertUtil.exe -hashfile $dir/rxnes-new.zip SHA256 | findstr -i fd75345b00a3b3e53d8ee7ba2d2c6fb9cb6fbdcd6a7b768bb96f51b3fa3e99b8); then mv $dir/rxnes-new.zip $dir/rxnes.zip && Write-Output 'rxnes has been updated to version $version!'; else Write-Output 'rxnes update failed integrity check!'; fi
